sections.paragraph:
noun

Apple Inc., American multinational enterprise (established on April 1st 1976 ) that designs, creates and manufactures electronics and computer software products for consumers

verb לאפל

to darken, blackout

verb אופל

be darkened, be blacked out

verb להאפיל

to darken; grow dark

verb להאפיל

to shadow, obscure; overshadow; ripen late

verb הואפל

be darkened, be blacked out

adjective

dark, gloomy, murky, shady, somber, obscure, obnubilated
